[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up, slightly blurry view of a cat’s face filling most of the frame.

The main subject is a cat with light-colored fur and darker markings around its eyes and nose area. The cat’s ears are upright, and its eyes appear partially visible and shadowed due to the blur. The face is centered, with the nose and mouth area taking up much of the lower middle of the image.

The setting appears to be indoors, suggested by a plain, light-colored background and a softly lit, out-of-focus wall or surface behind the cat. The lighting is soft and even, with no clear time-of-day cues.

Visual Details:
The cat’s fur looks pale with brown or darker patches, especially around the eyes and along the muzzle. The camera is very close to the cat, creating a tight composition focused on the face. The image is noticeably out of focus, with low sharpness across the entire frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
This is a close-up photo of a cat looking toward the camera with upright ears. The image is blurred and shows the cat’s face against a plain, light indoor background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
